chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
article_title: Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits
text: It is unlawful for any person under the age of 18 years to drive a school bus transporting pupils to or from school.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 1. Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits [12500 - 12527]
##### § 12516

It is unlawful for any person under the age of 18 years to drive a school bus transporting pupils to or from school.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful for any person under the age of 18 years to drive a school bus transporting pupils to or from school.
